cards.back: A model-free reinforcement learning algorithm that uses the Q-function to learn the expected return for each state-action pair
A type of reinforcement learning algorithm that uses a neural network to approximate the Q-function
A type of reinforcement learning algorithm that learns the policy directly, rather than the value function
A type of reinforcement learning algorithm that combines policy gradient methods with value function estimation
A type of model-free reinforcement learning algorithm that uses the TD-error to update the value function
